entry.data:
CLOUDY WITH A 50 PERCENT CHANCE OF SHOWERS
NEAR STEADY TEMPERATURE IN THE MID 70S
NORTHWEST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH A SLIGHT CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS
A SLIGHT CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE EVENING, THEN A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE MID 60S
CALM WINDS
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY IN THE MORNING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY SUNNY
SHOWERS LIKELY IN THE MORNING
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
SOUTH WINDS AROUND 5 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 70S
SOUTH WINDS AROUND 5 MPH IN THE EVENING, BECOMING LIGHT AND VARIABLE

MOSTLY SUNNY
HUMID WITH HIGHS IN THE LOWER 90S
CALM WINDS

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE MID 70S

MOSTLY SUNNY
HOT WITH HIGHS IN THE UPPER 90S
HIGHEST HEAT INDEX READINGS HEAT INDEX READINGS UP TO 110 IN THE AFTERNOON

MOSTLY CLEAR
HOT
LOWS IN THE UPPER 70S
HIGHS IN THE MID 90S

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE LOWER 70S

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 90S

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE LOWER 70S

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 90S
